creator: witr@rwwa.com
text:
Sometimes, after system has been up for a while (hours/days)
	a reboot doesn't get past the ``syncing disks n n n '' phase.
	(However, since I am usually rebooting due to ``strange'' 
	behaviour, this may only be a symptom.)  A hard reset
	is required.  
	
	Sorry for the woosy report, but I can't seem to isolate it
	more.  This never happened with 1.1.5.1.

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: 
	On this system, work for a while and then try to reboot.
